description: A color photograph of a man with short gray hair raising his right hand to his forehead in a salute. He wears a dark green uniform with a tactical vest; a name tape reads 'G. BOVINO' and a patch reads 'BORDER PATROL FEDERAL AGENT' with a gold badge. The background is an out-of-focus urban street scene. The man looks toward the camera with a neutral expression.
notable_text: G. BOVINO; BORDER PATROL FEDERAL AGENT
